title: Rhipidoglossum thomense

The genus Rhipidoglossum is part of the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Diurideae. Rhipidoglossum thomense is native to Africa and is a type of epiphytic orchid. Its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other orchids.
